service_provider_about_9: Dr. Karim offers confidential and professional psychiatric support online.

privacy_intro_content:
We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, update your profile, request services, or communicate with us. This includes:

• Identity Data: Name, email address, phone number.
• Transaction Data: Details about payments and services you have booked.
• Location Data: Precise or approximate location to connect you with nearby service providers.
privacy_usage_content:
We use the information we collect to:

• Provide, maintain, and improve our services.
• Process transactions and send related information.
• Connect you with service providers.
• Send you technical notices, updates, security alerts, and support messages.
• Respond to your comments, questions, and customer service requests.
privacy_sharing_content:
We may share your information with:

• Service Providers: To facilitate the services you request.
• Legal Obligations: If required by law or to protect our rights.
• Business Transfers: In connection with a merger or sale of assets.
privacy_security_content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
privacy_rights_content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You can manage your profile settings within the app or contact our support team for assistance.
privacy_children_content: Our services are not directed to individuals under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.
privacy_changes_content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new privacy policy on this page.
privacy_contact_content:
If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

support@servino.com
terms_intro_content: By accessing or using the Servino application, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this site.
terms_accounts_content: To access certain features of the app, you may be required to create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to provide accurate and complete information during registration.
terms_services_content: Servino acts as an intermediary platform connecting users with independent service providers. We do not provide the services ourselves and are not responsible for the quality, safety, or legality of the services provided by third-party providers. Any agreement for services is directly between you and the provider.
terms_conduct_content: You agree not to use the app for any unlawful purpose or in any way that interrupts, damages, or impairs the service. Prohibited behavior includes harassment, providing false information, and attempting to gain unauthorized access to other user accounts or our systems.
terms_payments_content: Payments for services are processed securely through our platform. Prices are set by the service providers or as per platform standards. Refund policies are subject to the specific terms of the service booked and our dispute resolution process.
terms_ip_content: All content included on this app, such as text, graphics, logos, images, and software, is the property of Servino or its content suppliers and protected by international copyright laws.
terms_liability_content: In no event shall Servino be liable for any damages (including, without limitation, damages for loss of data or profit, or due to business interruption) arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on Servino's app, even if Servino or a Servino authorized representative has been notified orally or in writing of the possibility of such damage.
terms_changes_content: Servino may revise these terms of use for its app at any time without notice. By using this app you are agreeing to be bound by the then current version of these Terms of Use.
terms_contact_content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at support@servino.com.
privacy_policy_content:
1. Information We Collect
We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, update your profile, request services, or communicate with us. This includes:

• Identity Data: Name, email address, phone number.
• Transaction Data: Details about payments and services you have booked.
• Location Data: Precise or approximate location to connect you with nearby service providers.

2. How We Use Your Information
We use the information we collect to:

• Provide, maintain, and improve our services.
• Process transactions and send related information.
• Connect you with service providers.
• Send you technical notices, updates, security alerts, and support messages.
• Respond to your comments, questions, and customer service requests.

3. Sharing of Information
We may share your information with:

• Service Providers: To facilitate the services you request.
• Legal Obligations: If required by law or to protect our rights.
• Business Transfers: In connection with a merger or sale of assets.

4. Data Security
We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

5. Your Rights
You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You can manage your profile settings within the app or contact our support team for assistance.

6. Children's Privacy
Our services are not directed to individuals under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.

7. Changes to this Policy
We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new privacy policy on this page.

8. Contact Us
If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

support@servino.com
terms_of_use_content:
1. Acceptance of Terms
By accessing or using the Servino application, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this site.

2. User Accounts
To access certain features of the app, you may be required to create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to provide accurate and complete information during registration.

3. Services and Booking
Servino acts as an intermediary platform connecting users with independent service providers. We do not provide the services ourselves and are not responsible for the quality, safety, or legality of the services provided by third-party providers. Any agreement for services is directly between you and the provider.

4. User Conduct
You agree not to use the app for any unlawful purpose or in any way that interrupts, damages, or impairs the service. Prohibited behavior includes harassment, providing false information, and attempting to gain unauthorized access to other user accounts or our systems.

5. Payments and Refunds
Payments for services are processed securely through our platform. Prices are set by the service providers or as per platform standards. Refund policies are subject to the specific terms of the service booked and our dispute resolution process.

6. Intellectual Property
All content included on this app, such as text, graphics, logos, images, and software, is the property of Servino or its content suppliers and protected by international copyright laws.

7. Limitation of Liability
In no event shall Servino be liable for any damages (including, without limitation, damages for loss of data or profit, or due to business interruption) arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on Servino's app, even if Servino or a Servino authorized representative has been notified orally or in writing of the possibility of such damage.

8. Modifications to Terms
Servino may revise these terms of use for its app at any time without notice. By using this app you are agreeing to be bound by the then current version of these Terms of Use.

9. Contact Us
If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at support@servino.com.
